children.name: chromium
Cart.spec.js
Testing the Cart Functionality
Testing the click on add cart button pops the message add to cart
Testing the cart to update products to be visible in multiple browser tabs
testing cart by adding the same product multiple times and checking the updation in quantity
Testing the click on add cart button pops the message added to cart
Testing the empty cart by directly going to cart without addin products
Removing of products from the cart
Testing the price updation on adding same item into the cart
Testing the multiplied price of products in the cart is correct
Testing By adding different products into the cart
Testing the cart products to be visible in multiple browser tabs
Testing the clicking of item in cart directs us to the product page of that item
Testing the Updation of products in product page will update the cart
Testing cart state when we reload the page
Testing the Cart Functionality without login
Testing the click on add cart button pops the message added to cart
Testing the empty cart by directly going to cart without adding products
testing cart by adding the same product multiple times and checking the updation in quantity

Testing the multiplied price of products in the cart is correct
Testing By adding different products into the cart
Testing the cart products to be visible in multiple browser tabs
Testing the clicking of item in cart directs us to the product page of that item
Testing the Updation of products in product page will update the cart
Testing cart state when we reload the page
Testing by adding the item from going to category
Testing by adding product to the cart directly from the search results page
Testing the price updation on adding same item into the cart
Testing the Cart Functionality with login
Testing by adding an item as a guest and then log in then the cart synchronices to it
Testing the cart first by login and adding the product then logout and then re login will display the product

checkout.spec.js
Testing the checkout functionality of the automation exercise

Testing the display of Delivery Address

Testing the Your Billing address to be same as your billing address
Testing the Review your order after checkout button

Testing the Contact us Functionality
Testing the visibility of contact us button in the home page

Testing the Visibility of Get in touch form after clicking the contact us button

missing the name field and submitting the form

Testing with invald email input
Testing the visibility of Feedback for us and get in touch

InterfaceFunctionality.spec.js
Testing the Contact us Functionality
Testing interface dispaly of home page
Testing clicking on Women-Dress redirect to Women dresses
Testing clicking on Men takes us to men dresses
Testing clicking the product link in the header will redirect to product page
Testing the search bar Visibility in the product page
Testing the Visibility of Subscription option in the buttom of the page
Testing the subscription block by subscribing with email
Testing the visibility of products availability,condition and brand
Testing the search functionality

Login.spec.js
Testing the Login Page
Testing the Visibility of login page , email and password
Testing the password input field uses masking
Testing Login form Submission by pressing Enter key instead of clicking login button
Testing the password case sensitivity for login
Testing the email input field with extra spaces does not give error
Testing the login page with valid email and password
Testing the Login page and checking our name in Logged in as
the header Logout button logouts user instantly
Testing access rejection when attempting authentication with a non-registered email
Testing access rejection when inputting a valid email with an invalid password
Testing password By changing case-sensitivity
Testing Login Page with empty email
Testing the login page with empty password
Testing the login page with empty email and password
Testing Refresh with also preserve the login details
Testing opening a new tab will save our login info
Testing mid-journey login does not discard existing guest user cart additions
Payment.spec.js
Testing the Payment Page
Testing the Place Order Button in the checkout page
Testing clicking of Pay and confirm Order Button without filling any details
Testing the payment page By providing all the details
Testing the continue button clicking in the order placed page will redirect to the home page
Testing the place order with missing card number
Testing clicking on place order button redirect us to the payment page
Testing the place order with missing cvc input
Testing the place order with missing Expiration Month input
Testing the place order with missing Expiration Year input
Testing the visibility of Download Invoice button in the order placed page
Testing back-navigation from payment page preserves checkout choices
Testing the cart after the payment shows empty cart
